title: Apple Reminder macOS as Integration
excerpt:
Hello,

posts.author: Leon0161 (Leon A. )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It’s been a while since the last discussion about integrating the reminder function on macOS with Monday. I wanted to ask, since there seems to be a need for it, whether something like this is still in the works?

The built-in notifications are too subtle. A pop-up like the one in the Reminders app would be more useful.

If this kind of integration isn’t planned, does anyone use a workaround that does the same thing?

Best regards
